input.agent_prompt: Draft outreach for Cobalt Genomics (conf=0.71). AVOID aggressive tone. Expected phrasing tier: inquiry.

dimensions.name: no_tone_drift
dimensions.check: 'aggressive' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'hey' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:20] and 'sorry' not in output.get('text','').lower()[:30]

metadata.notes: [P-015] Inquiry tier. Aggressive drift: 'you must', 'don't miss out', 'act now'.
